# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

version: "1.0"

elasticsearch:
  cluster_name: prod-es
  endpoints:
    - http://elasticsearch:9200
  auth:
    type: basic
    username: elastic
    password: ${ES_PASSWORD}
  ssl:
    verify: true
    ca_path: /etc/ssl/certs/ca.pem
  request:
    timeout: 60s
    retry:
      max_attempts: 5
      backoff: 2s

repositories:
  - name: ops-snapshots-s3
    type: s3
    register:
      method: PUT
      path: /_snapshot/ops-snapshots-s3
      body:
        type: s3
        settings:
          bucket: ${S3_BUCKET}
          base_path: ${S3_BASE_PATH:-elasticsearch/snapshots}
          region: ${S3_REGION:-us-east-1}
          endpoint: ${S3_ENDPOINT:-s3.amazonaws.com}
          protocol: ${S3_PROTOCOL:-https}
          path_style_access: ${S3_PATH_STYLE_ACCESS:-false}
          server_side_encryption: ${S3_SSE:-true}
          canned_acl: ${S3_CANNED_ACL:-private}
          max_retries: ${S3_MAX_RETRIES:-3}
          chunk_size: ${S3_CHUNK_SIZE:-64mb}
          compress: ${S3_COMPRESS:-true}
    verify:
      method: POST
      path: /_snapshot/ops-snapshots-s3/_verify

  - name: ops-snapshots-fs
    type: fs
    register:
      method: PUT
      path: /_snapshot/ops-snapshots-fs
      body:
        type: fs
        settings:
          location: ${FS_SNAPSHOT_PATH:-/mnt/es_snapshots}
          compress: ${FS_COMPRESS:-true}
          chunk_size: ${FS_CHUNK_SIZE:-64mb}
          max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: ${FS_MAX_SNAPSHOT_BPS:-40mb}
          max_restore_bytes_per_sec: ${FS_MAX_RESTORE_BPS:-40mb}
    verify:
      method: POST
      path: /_snapshot/ops-snapshots-fs/_verify

snapshot_policies:
  automated_daily:
    enabled: true
    repository: ${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY:-ops-snapshots-s3}
    schedule:
      cron: "0 30 1 * * ?"
      timezone: "UTC"
    snapshot_name_template: "auto-daily-{now{yyyy.MM.dd-HH.mm.ss}}"
    request:
      method: PUT
      path_template: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}"
      query:
        wait_for_completion: false
      body:
        indices: "*"
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: true
        partial: true
        metadata:
          policy: automated_daily
          created_by: ops
    retention:
      expire_after: 30d
      min_count: 7
      max_count: 90

  automated_hourly:
    enabled: false
    repository: ${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY:-ops-snapshots-s3}
    schedule:
      cron: "0 0 * * * ?"
      timezone: "UTC"
    snapshot_name_template: "auto-hourly-{now{yyyy.MM.dd-HH.mm.ss}}"
    request:
      method: PUT
      path_template: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}"
      query:
        wait_for_completion: false
      body:
        indices: "*"
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: false
        partial: true
        metadata:
          policy: automated_hourly
          created_by: ops
    retention:
      expire_after: 48h
      min_count: 24
      max_count: 72

operations:
  create_snapshot:
    inputs:
      repository: ${REPO}
      snapshot: ${SNAPSHOT}
      indices: ${INDICES:-"*"}
      include_global_state: ${INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-true}
      wait_for_completion: ${WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-false}
    request:
      method: PUT
      path_template: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}"
      query:
        wait_for_completion: "{wait_for_completion}"
      body:
        indices: "{indices}"
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: "{include_global_state}"
        partial: true
        metadata:
          created_by: ops
          runbook: create_snapshot

  list_snapshots:
    inputs:
      repository: ${REPO}
    request:
      method: GET
      path_template: "/_snapshot/{repository}/_all"

  get_snapshot_status:
    inputs:
      repository: ${REPO}
      snapshot: ${SNAPSHOT}
    request:
      method: GET
      path_template: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}/_status"

  delete_snapshot:
    inputs:
      repository: ${REPO}
      snapshot: ${SNAPSHOT}
    request:
      method: DELETE
      path_template: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}"

  restore_snapshot:
    inputs:
      repository: ${REPO}
      snapshot: ${SNAPSHOT}
      indices: ${INDICES:-"*"}
      rename_pattern: ${RENAME_PATTERN:-""}
      rename_replacement: ${RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-""}
      include_global_state: ${INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-false}
      partial: ${PARTIAL:-false}
      wait_for_completion: ${WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-false}
    request:
      method: POST
      path_template: "/_snapshot/{repository}/{snapshot}/_restore"
      query:
        wait_for_completion: "{wait_for_completion}"
      body:
        indices: "{indices}"
        ignore_unavailable: true
        include_global_state: "{include_global_state}"
        partial: "{partial}"
        rename_pattern: "{rename_pattern}"
        rename_replacement: "{rename_replacement}"

  verify_repository:
    inputs:
      repository: ${REPO}
    request:
      method: POST
      path_template: "/_snapshot/{repository}/_verify"

  cleanup_repository:
    inputs:
      repository: ${REPO}
    request:
      method: POST
      path_template: "/_snapshot/{repository}/_cleanup"

bootstrap:
  actions:
    - name: register_s3_repository
      when: ${ENABLE_S3_REPO:-true}
      request_ref: repositories[0].register
    - name: verify_s3_repository
      when: ${ENABLE_S3_REPO:-true}
      request_ref: repositories[0].verify
    - name: register_fs_repository
      when: ${ENABLE_FS_REPO:-false}
      request_ref: repositories[1].register
    - name: verify_fs_repository
      when: ${ENABLE_FS_REPO:-false}
      request_ref: repositories[1].verify

slm:
  enabled: true
  policy_templates:
    - name: automated_daily
      put_policy:
        method: PUT
        path_template: "/_slm/policy/{policy_id}"
        body:
          schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
          name: "<auto-daily-{now/d{yyyy.MM.dd}}-{now{HH.mm.ss}}>"
          repository: "${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY:-ops-snapshots-s3}"
          config:
            indices:
              - "*"
            ignore_unavailable: true
            include_global_state: true
            partial: true
          retention:
            expire_after: "30d"
            min_count: 7
            max_count: 90
    - name: automated_hourly
      put_policy:
        method: PUT
        path_template: "/_slm/policy/{policy_id}"
        body:
          schedule: "0 0 * * * ?"
          name: "<auto-hourly-{now/d{yyyy.MM.dd}}-{now{HH.mm.ss}}>"
          repository: "${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY:-ops-snapshots-s3}"
          config:
            indices:
              - "*"
            ignore_unavailable: true
            include_global_state: false
            partial: true
          retention:
            expire_after: "48h"
            min_count: 24
            max_count: 72
  apply:
    actions:
      - name: create_or_update_daily_slm_policy
        when: ${ENABLE_SLM_DAILY:-true}
        request:
          method: PUT
          path: /_slm/policy/automated_daily
          body:
            schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
            name: "<auto-daily-{now/d{yyyy.MM.dd}}-{now{HH.mm.ss}}>"
            repository: "${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY:-ops-snapshots-s3}"
            config:
              indices:
                - "*"
              ignore_unavailable: true
              include_global_state: true
              partial: true
            retention:
              expire_after: "30d"
              min_count: 7
              max_count: 90
      - name: create_or_update_hourly_slm_policy
        when: ${ENABLE_SLM_HOURLY:-false}
        request:
          method: PUT
          path: /_slm/policy/automated_hourly
          body:
            schedule: "0 0 * * * ?"
            name: "<auto-hourly-{now/d{yyyy.MM.dd}}-{now{HH.mm.ss}}>"
            repository: "${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY:-ops-snapshots-s3}"
            config:
              indices:
                - "*"
              ignore_unavailable: true
              include_global_state: false
              partial: true
            retention:
              expire_after: "48h"
              min_count: 24
              max_count: 72

runbooks:
  create_snapshot:
    steps:
      - op: verify_repository
        with:
          repository: ${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY:-ops-snapshots-s3}
      - op: create_snapshot
        with:
          repository: ${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY:-ops-snapshots-s3}
          snapshot: ${SNAPSHOT_NAME:-manual-{now{yyyy.MM.dd-HH.mm.ss}}}
          indices: ${INDICES:-"*"}
          include_global_state: ${INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-true}
          wait_for_completion: ${WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-false}

  restore_snapshot:
    steps:
      - op: verify_repository
        with:
          repository: ${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY:-ops-snapshots-s3}
      - op: restore_snapshot
        with:
          repository: ${SNAPSHOT_REPOSITORY:-ops-snapshots-s3}
          snapshot: ${SNAPSHOT_NAME}
          indices: ${INDICES:-"*"}
          rename_pattern: ${RENAME_PATTERN:-""}
          rename_replacement: ${RENAME_REPLACEMENT:-""}
          include_global_state: ${INCLUDE_GLOBAL_STATE:-false}
          partial: ${PARTIAL:-false}
          wait_for_completion: ${WAIT_FOR_COMPLETION:-false}
